TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Lance_Blanks, title = Lance_Blanks, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Lance_Blanks} }

S.FORM: Lance Blanks sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 9, Lance Blanks, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
Lance Blanks sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA. kawas tay 1966, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 9, Lance Blanks, squliq na p'unro. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: lanʦ~ʨe βlanks~ɕ s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, lanʦ~ʨe βlanks~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
